# Third-Party Source Notes

This directory records public repositories and bibliographic entries cited in the practice sections of the associated book. It is not the full bibliography of the book manuscript.

- `SOURCE.md` records public repositories, corresponding papers, BibTeX keys, and attribution notes.
- `references.bib` provides BibTeX entries for practice-section references and external source entries.
- `LICENSES.md` explains the boundary between this companion repository and external projects.

External projects remain governed by their own licenses, citation requirements, and usage terms. This companion repository does not redistribute third-party source code, datasets, trained models, or documentation.
